name: 10Web
description: 10Web is an AI-powered WordPress platform that generates complete websites from text prompts or reference URLs. It bundles managed hosting on Google Cloud, automated backups, PageSpeed optimization, and an AI Writing Assistant for ongoing editing. Targets SMBs, freelancers, and agencies.
oneLiner: AI-powered WordPress platform that generates, hosts, and manages complete websites from a single text prompt.
pricing: Free trial; Personal $10/mo (1 site); Premium $15/mo (3 sites); Agency $23/mo (10 sites)
capabilities: AI website generation from text prompts
AI Writing Assistant for content editing

uxAnalysis.builderFlow: Fully no-code. Enter business description or paste URL, select page types, AI generates complete Elementor-based WordPress site in 1-2 minutes. Customize in Elementor drag-and-drop editor with AI Assistant sidebar. Flow: Describe Business -> Choose Pages -> AI Generates -> Preview -> Edit -> Publish.
strengths: Working website from a single prompt in under 5 minutes
Real contextual content, not lorem ipsum
Built on Elementor for familiar visual editing
weaknesses: Not a general agent platform — purely vertical for WordPress
No API for AI generation capabilities
Generated content needs human review for accuracy

recentDevelopments: 2025 Q1: Enhanced multi-page generation with cross-page design coherence
2024 Q3: AI Writing Assistant in Elementor

subCriteria.name: Agent Builder UX
subCriteria.rationale: Prompt-to-website in minutes. No coding required. Under 10 min to working site.

subCriteria.name: Time-to-Value
subCriteria.rationale: No AI debugging tools. Preview and edit in Elementor is the only feedback loop.

subCriteria.name: Debugging & Testing
subCriteria.rationale: Good tutorials, video guides, knowledge base. Gentle learning curve.

subCriteria.name: Documentation & Learning
subCriteria.rationale: Regenerate sections quickly. Edit with Elementor live preview. AI Assistant for content.

subCriteria.name: Multi-Agent Coordination
subCriteria.rationale: No multi-agent. Single-purpose generation tool.

subCriteria.name: Human-in-the-Loop Design
subCriteria.rationale: Simple generate-then-edit. No structured handoff or reasoning visibility.

subCriteria.name: Workflow Templates
subCriteria.rationale: No collaborative AI features. Basic WordPress multi-user.

subCriteria.name: Team Development
subCriteria.rationale: No collaborative AI features. Basic WordPress multi-user.

subCriteria.name: Native Connectors
subCriteria.rationale: WordPress ecosystem only. No CRM/ERP/database connectors.

subCriteria.name: API & Protocol Standards
subCriteria.rationale: No public API for AI builder. No MCP. Standard WordPress REST API only.

subCriteria.name: Authentication & Access
subCriteria.rationale: WordPress-level auth only. No enterprise IAM.

subCriteria.name: Data Pipeline & RAG
subCriteria.rationale: No RAG, vector stores, or data connectors. Prompt text and URLs only.

subCriteria.name: Guardrails & Kill Switches
subCriteria.rationale: No AI-specific guardrails beyond underlying LLM safety filtering.

subCriteria.name: Audit Trail & Compliance
subCriteria.rationale: Natural HITL — nothing publishes without user action. Simple but effective.

subCriteria.name: RBAC & Access Control
subCriteria.rationale: No AI audit trail. No compliance certifications.

subCriteria.name: Explainability & Transparency
subCriteria.rationale: Basic dashboard roles. WordPress-level access. No enterprise RBAC.

subCriteria.name: Deployment Flexibility
subCriteria.rationale: SaaS-only on 10Web's Google Cloud. No self-hosted option.

subCriteria.name: Scaling & Monitoring
subCriteria.rationale: Google Cloud auto-scaling. PageSpeed optimized. Adequate for SMB traffic.

subCriteria.name: Cost Management
subCriteria.rationale: Basic uptime and PageSpeed dashboards. No AI-specific observability.

subCriteria.name: Ecosystem Maturity
subCriteria.rationale: 50K+ hosted websites. WordPress community. No developer ecosystem for AI features.

scoringRationale: 10Web scores 44/100. Builder Experience (14) is standout — prompt to site in minutes. Everything else is low: Deployment (9) SaaS-only, Integration (7) WordPress-only, Governance (5) no enterprise features, Collaboration (4) single-purpose, Ecosystem (5) modest. Excels vertically but not an agent factory.
targetUser: SMBs and agencies generating WordPress sites with AI

walkthrough.title: How 10Web Works: AI Website Generation in Minutes

steps.title: Describe Your Business
steps.description: Enter a text description of your business — what you do, your target audience, and desired tone. Alternatively, paste a URL of a website you want to recreate or draw inspiration from.

steps.title: Select Page Types
steps.description: Choose which pages to generate: Home, About, Services, Contact, Blog, Portfolio, Shop. The AI will create each page with contextually relevant content, not lorem ipsum placeholder text.

steps.title: AI Generates Complete WordPress Site
steps.description: In 1-2 minutes, the AI generates a complete Elementor-based WordPress site with real content, images, and consistent cross-page design. Pages are immediately editable and responsive.

steps.title: Customize in Visual Editor
steps.description: Use the Elementor drag-and-drop editor to customize any element. The AI Writing Assistant sidebar helps rewrite copy, generate new sections, and optimize content for SEO.

steps.title: Publish on Managed Hosting
steps.description: Publish directly to 10Web's Google Cloud hosting with automated PageSpeed optimization (90+ scores), SSL, automated backups, and one-click restore. Site is live in seconds.
